title: cyclopogon pululahuanus
intro: Cyclopogon pululahuanus, also known as Pululahua orchid, is a rare and endemic orchid species native to Ecuador. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclopogon pululahuanus include its potential to treat wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infused in water to create a herbal remedy, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
